hero.title: Modern Websites That Help Businesses

services.label: What I Offer
services.heading: Web Development Services
services.description: From simple business websites to advanced AI-powered solutions, I build what your business needs to grow online.

items.title: Business Websites
items.description: A professional online presence with all the pages your business needs: home, about, services, contact, and more. Built to convert visitors into customers.

items.title: Landing Pages
items.description: High-converting single-page websites designed for marketing campaigns, product launches, or lead generation. Fast, focused, and effective.

items.title: Portfolio Websites
items.description: Showcase your work with a stunning portfolio website. Perfect for photographers, designers, artists, and creative professionals.

items.title: AI-Powered Web Solutions
items.description: Integrate intelligent features like chatbots, personalized recommendations, and smart search into your website. Stay ahead of the competition.

items.title: Website Redesigns
items.description: Give your existing website a fresh, modern look. Improve performance, user experience, and conversion rates without losing your brand identity.

reasons.title: SEO-Friendly Structure
reasons.description: Built with search engines in mind. Your website will be ready to rank from day one.

reasons.title: Direct Communication
reasons.description: You talk directly to me, not a sales team. Clear, honest communication throughout the project.

reasons.title: Affordable Pricing
reasons.description: Quality websites at fair prices tailored for Algerian businesses. No hidden fees or surprises.

reasons.title: Reliable Support
reasons.description: I stand by my work. You get ongoing support and maintenance even after your website launches.

process.label: How I Work
process.heading: From Idea to Launch
process.description: A simple, transparent process designed to get you results without the hassle.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: I learn about your business, goals, target audience, and what you want your website to achieve.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: I create wireframes and a visual design concept for your website. You review and provide feedback until everything looks perfect.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: I build your website using modern technologies. The site is responsive, fast, and fully functional.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: After your approval, I deploy the website to your domain. I handle all the technical setup.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: I provide ongoing support and maintenance. Whether you need updates or have questions, I am here to help.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.heading: Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: Quality websites at fair prices. No hidden fees, no surprises.
pricing.disclaimer: Final pricing depends on project requirements, complexity, and requested features. Contact me for a free, personalized quote.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to common questions about my services and process.

items.question: How long does a website take?
items.answer: A standard business website typically takes 5 to 10 days from start to launch. The timeline depends on the complexity of your project and how quickly you provide feedback. I always provide a clear timeline before starting any project.

items.question: Do you provide hosting?
items.answer: I do not provide hosting directly, but I help you set up reliable hosting and handle the entire deployment process. I recommend trusted providers and can manage the technical setup so your website runs smoothly.

items.question: Can you redesign an existing website?
items.answer: Absolutely. I specialize in redesigning outdated websites and giving them a fresh, modern look. I will preserve your brand identity while improving design, performance, and user experience.

items.question: How do payments work?
items.answer: I require a 50% deposit to start the project and the remaining 50% upon completion and your approval. Payments are accepted via bank transfer or other agreed methods. Every detail is discussed and agreed upon before work begins.

items.question: Can I update the website later?
items.answer: Yes. I build websites that are easy to update. Depending on your needs, I can include a simple content management system or provide training so you can make basic updates yourself. I also offer ongoing maintenance services if you prefer.

cta.heading: Ready to Grow Your Business Online?
cta.description: Get a modern, professional website that helps customers discover your business, trust your brand, and contact you easily.
